title: Contemplation: Its Cultivation and Culmination Through the Buddhist Glasses.

assets.abstract: Buddhist account of consciousness provides a new way of looking into contemplation, where absorption into meditation does not only bring in changes in the neural level but in the very personality of the individual, turning him into a good human being. The Buddhists recommend the practice of vipassanā, literally meaning insight but actually standing for the realization of the supreme enlightenment breaking off all the internal fetters through the practice of seven different types of purity, such

phase_mapping.bridge_rationale: Bridge paper score=5.5: links Liberation/Enlightenment concept to mechanistic neuroscience
